genre_refs: vintage WPA/Art Deco poster style; stylized political portrait
description: A designed USDOL portrait poster of President Donald Trump rendered as a high-contrast, stylized monochrome illustration rather than a photograph. The image is a posterized grey/blue-grey vector-style portrait of Trump's head and shoulders against a dark, subtly textured background; he wears a dark suit, shirt and tie and gazes forward with a stern, determined expression, his hair and facial features defined by bold flat tonal shapes (an editorial/screen-print aesthetic). Across the bottom, in cream-colored vintage-style condensed capital lettering arranged on two lines, is the slogan 'THE PRESIDENT OF THE / AMERICAN WORKER,' with 'AMERICAN WORKER' larger as the emphasized payoff line. The retro typography and heroic single-figure framing evoke 20th-century labor/propaganda poster design. Propaganda technique: hagiographic 'strongman' portraiture casting the President as the singular champion of American workers, reinforcing the Department of Labor's economic-nationalist branding. The tweet ('The globalist status quo is OVER... put AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST') restates the message. Target audience: blue-collar workers, organized-labor-adjacent voters, and the administration's economic-nationalist base.
notable_text: THE PRESIDENT OF THE AMERICAN WORKER
